look_around.description: Streamed text for arriving at a location and taking it in - notes creatures if any are present

camp_scene.description: Streamed vanity dialogue between the party's monsters as they set up camp

sneak_attempt.description: Judge whether the party manages to sneak past the monsters in the area

ambush_intro.description: The party strikes first - narration for a surprise attack on unsuspecting monsters

dungeon_ability_use.description: THE DUNGEON REFEREE: a party monster uses an ability on anything, outside battle - the LLM decides if it does anything at all
